subcodes.first_line: Herein hath been captured the rapture of the Call that was raised from the direction of 'Akká, the Mount Sinai, whereat all things cried out in proclamation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا فیه اخذ جذب الندآء الذی ارتفع من شطر عکاء طور سیناء بذلک نادت الاشیاء
subcodes.subjects: @proclamation to Christians, @prophecy and fulfillment, @prayer for praise and gratitude, @Mosaic imagery, @praise and encouragement
